logic_parity_findings: The generated code aligns with the Logic Map, implementing all critical constraints and business rules correctly. However, minor issues and edge cases were found.

defects.description: No validation for negative years of service in the calculate_bonus function
defects.suggested_fix: Add a check for negative years of service and handle it according to the business rules

defects.description: No handling for extremely high years of service in the calculate_bonus function
defects.suggested_fix: Add a check for extremely high years of service and handle it according to the business rules

defects.description: No error handling for file operations in the generate_report function
defects.suggested_fix: Add try-except blocks to handle potential file operation errors

suggested_corrections: Add input validation for years of service in the calculate_bonus function
Implement error handling for file operations in the generate_report function

confidence.rationale: The generated code correctly implements all critical constraints and business rules. Although minor issues and edge cases were found, they do not affect the overall logic parity.

known_limitations: The purpose of the FILLER fields in the RPT-REC record is unclear and was not implemented
